description: RISC-V Arithmetic Logic Unit - combinational sub-module of riscv_exec
risk_points: Barrel shifter accumulates intermediate results across 5 stages, each conditional on a bit of shamt
Arithmetic right shift uses signed int32_t cast, sign extension is implementation-defined behavior across shift stages
Unsigned comparison uses full 32-bit range, including values > INT32_MAX
Signed comparison uses int32_t cast, edge case with 0x80000000 (INT32_MIN)
ALU_SUB is opcode 0x6 (not 0x5), non-contiguous opcode space
Default case (unrecognized opcode) falls through to passthrough
